title: マイルCSの後に・風は冷え心は熱く

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I did it.
choice_data_list: I knew you had it in you!
I knew you had it in you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I think I was able to show everyone
what I'm really made of.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. I can hear cheers from outside.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oguri was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I know it isn't her best distance, but I really want
to see her in the year-end race!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...It sounds like everyone has high expectations
for me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wanna do it... I wanna run in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is really motivated. This seems like the
perfect opportunity to share my good news with
her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So you think I'll get to run in the Arima Kinen?!
choice_data_list: Keep it up, and I'm sure you will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I look at online polls and newspaper
predictions, Oguri Cap's name is always there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really? Everyone must have such high hopes for
me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Their support is my strength. There's no way I can
lose like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators' enthusiasm, Oguri Cap's passion,
and my own fervor have all reached a fever pitch.
choice_data_list: The Arima Kinen is just around the corner!
The Arima Kinen is just around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... And I'm gonna make it! It's the race of my
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... All right, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a minute, Creek! Isn't it 'bout time you
took a break?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to see ya so passionate, but you're going
too far! This isn't like you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, are you worried about me? You're such
a sweetheart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't deflect! This is 'cause of summer camp,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ever since you raced against Oguri, you've been
pushing yourself way too hard!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...I couldn't get ahead of her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: If we were to race again right now, I know I'd lose.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to excel in more than just the races I'm
already good at—and to do that, I need to build
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But Creek... Why are you so hung up on Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose to her. If I'm not strong myself, how
am I supposed to support anyone else?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the strongest and most reliable
person around.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to get even stronger. I've got to
be miles ahead of Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...All right, all right. I get it! No need to get so
worked up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave ya to it. But remember to stay hydrated.
I'm gonna fetch you some water!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks, Inari. You really are a sweetheart.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You had a race today, didn't you? I'm sure you
did great, as always.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's name has been in every single
Arima Kinen poll I've come across. It looks like
these two will finally be going head-to-head in a
real race!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for the Arima Kinen. If you're able to
run against me again, that'll be the icing on the
cake.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I might not have beaten you at summer
camp, but things will be different this time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Let's both do our best, then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And one more thing... I have no intention of
losing either. Please bear that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I want you to be in top form when I
beat you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Great! ♪ I'd better carry on with my training,
then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Creek is working really hard.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There may not be long left until the Arima Kinen,
but I want to do everything I can to prepare too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please lend me your support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The big race is just days away. I once again
resolve to make sure that Oguri Cap comes out
on top.
